ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., Zip, City, Metro) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Zip code, City name) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "cbsa_title" TEXT /* Title of the Core Based Statistical Area (CBSA) where the region is located */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metro ID */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the region in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_metro_id FOREIGN KEY ("metro_id") REFERENCES metros ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "size_rank_city" INTEGER /* Size rank of the city */,
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metro ID */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_metro_id FOREIGN KEY ("metro_id") REFERENCES metros ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metros" (
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the metropolitan area is located */,
  "size_rank_metro" INTEGER /* Size rank of the metropolitan area */,
  "metro_population" INTEGER /* Population of the metropolitan area */,
  "metro_area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the metropolitan area in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region ID */,
  "pct_price_cut" REAL /* Percentage price cut for the region */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days on market for the region */,
  "buyer_seller_index" REAL /* Buyer-seller index for the region */,
  "buyer_seller_index_metro" REAL /* Buyer-seller index for the metropolitan area */,
  "avg_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price for the region */,
  "median_sale_price" REAL /* Median sale price for the region */,
  "price_per_sqft" REAL /* Price per square foot for the region */,
  "rental_yield" REAL /* Rental yield for the region */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Market trend for the region (e.g., rising, falling, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indicators_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, investor, policymaker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Login time of the user */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Logout time of the user */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Subscription date of the user */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Payment amount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
